title: Openmind Networks
description: openmindnetworks.com zoominfo.com/c/openmind-networks-ltd/351059313 Dublin-based independent technology firm with 20+ years of expertise in mobile messaging infrastructure. Delivers advanced software solutions for telecom operators: intelligent message routing, AI-powered fraud prevention, and RCS business messaging platforms for the 5G era. Processes over 1.5 billion messages daily for a global clientele of leading mobile carriers and wholesale aggregators, with annual revenue of approximately $20.1 million
